def test_bucketsort_with_repeated_values():
    arr = [3, 1, 2, 1]
    k = 4
    expected = [1, 1, 2, 3]
    assert bucketsort(arr, k) == expected, f"Expected {expected}, got {bucketsort(arr, k)}"
